designerDirection.artisticCorrection: Decide whether this section should remain Tree-only or intentionally add a support family.
mustPreserve: The section reads as a single focused idea.
Density is consistent across the sampled window (sparse).
mustAvoid: The visual footprint is very narrow relative to the full scene.
Only one family is carrying the section (Tree).
designerDirection.evaluationPrompt: Decide whether this section should remain Tree-only or intentionally add a support family.

sequencerDirection.executionObjective: Broaden the active footprint with one secondary support family while preserving the lead target.
allowedMoves: Active content is concentrated enough to make the lead target legible.
Frame-to-frame density remains stable through the sampled checkpoint.
Centroid motion indicates the active content is evolving, not frozen.
blockedMoves: Macro instability blocks section, group, model, and effect refinement.

successChecks: Highest active revision level remains macro.
